title: Atomic dimension landing
summary: Five new HLK governance dimensions land in a single P1 commit; no partial / sequential rollout.

title: Two-layer SSOT (markdown for prose, CSV for metadata)
summary: Markdown stays canonical for narrative; CSVs become canonical for queryable metadata. Sync gates enforce agreement.

title: REPOSITORY_REGISTRY promotion path
summary: REPOSITORIES_REGISTRY.md and REPOSITORY_REGISTRY.csv are joint canonicals (markdown for prose, CSV for FK target).

title: Status taxonomy ownership at akos.planning.status_taxonomy
summary: Seven-value StrEnum (closed/archived/active/continuous/program_line/gated_external/gated_operator) + companion-field rules.

title: DECISION_REGISTER inclusion in I59
summary: Folded into I59 (vs I60 deferral) so initiative_registry's *_decision_id fields can be real FKs from day one.

title: Nullable FKs (manifests_processes, coordinated_initiative_ids)
summary: Empty is explicit and fine; wrong is not. Validators FK-resolve when set, allow empty.

title: manifests_processes column on INITIATIVE_REGISTRY (vs inverse)
summary: FK lives on the initiative side as a semicolon-list to process_list.csv; reverse-lookup via mirror queries.

title: Header-only seed for INITIATIVE/OPS/CYCLE/DECISION in P1; bulk seed in P3
summary: Avoids circular FK pressure during validator runs; P3 lockstep seed against fully-populated peer tables.

title: Two new SOPs at status: review until G-59-D in P9
summary: SOP-INITIATIVE_GOVERNANCE_001 + SOP-INITIATIVE_PROCESS_HARMONISATION_001 ship at review state; ratified at P9.

title: OPS-58-3 rubric calibration fix lands in I59 P6 (not deferred to I60)
summary: _heuristic_persona_fit gets persona context from scenario.persona_id so cross-persona alignment lifts above 80%.

title: Telemetry promotion routine runs once in I59 P7 (in operator's stead)
summary: Auto-merge forbidden per I49 P11 / I50 P5; agent runs the proposal pass and operator merges at next sitting.

title: Process_list mints deferred to I60 candidate
summary: I59 P8 ships the harmonisation proposal + new SOP; actual minting per-tranche is operator-approval-gated and out of scope here.

title: process_list mint authority chain: SOP-META + role_owner + tranche operator approval
summary: No agent minting. Tranches authored under reports/process-list-mint-proposal-*.md and decision-log entries.

title: I59 closure UAT requires zero advisory warnings under --strict on the 8 new validators
summary: P10 closure gate flips advisory→strict on validate_master_roadmap_frontmatter and the 3 sync gates.

title: Rename I14 Phase 3 migration to clean tail timestamp
summary: Idempotent reapply at 20260503190000 to keep migration ledger linear.

title: Reverse-import kirbe.monitoring_logs_retention to git
summary: Pre-existing remote body imported to git so git remains SSOT.

title: GraphRAG PoC NO-SHIP verdict (D-IH-46-E non-additive bar)
summary: Non-additive bar (≥3pp / ≥30% / ≥40%) not cleared; ship deferred under conditional gate.

title: Judge live-API wiring + roster pivot under operator go-all-out
summary: Wired _call_member_via_api for live Anthropic + OpenAI dispatch; pivoted to all-Anthropic roster after key probe.

title: OPS-58-3 forwarded as engineering follow-up
summary: Persona-aware offline _heuristic_persona_fit fix (RICE 149) closes the persona=None rubric gap.

title: OpenAI key rotation forwarded as operator action
summary: Existing key returns 401; operator rotates and updates ~/.openclaw/.env (RICE 144).

title: Panel placement (new top-level operator group /operator/planning/)
summary: New top-level /operator/planning/ group; existing /operator/initiatives stays as registry-rolled view; no nesting under /mission-control to keep MC at 7 tiles.

title: Markdown rendering source (live GitHub Contents API, 60s cache, 5-min Supabase fallback)
summary: GitHub is SSOT for markdown; mirror lag rejected; deploy-time prebuild rejected; primary path is GitHub Contents API; secondary cache fallback only on outage.

title: Time-travel via ?ref=<sha> query string (with date-picker resolver)
summary: Use git-native history via GitHub Contents ?ref=<sha>; reject Supabase historical snapshots (duplicates git); date-picker resolver via git rev-list --before; feature-flagged off if not ready by P3.
